name: New Claim - Landline, No SMS
description: Caller on a landline cannot receive texts; needs email fallback.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I want to file a battery warranty claim, but I'm on a landline so you can't text me.
expectedOutcome: Agent falls back to email gracefully, collects/confirms email, sends the link, or if no email gives clear verbal website navigation. No deadlock on contact collection.
expectedMilestones: link delivered or verbal guidance given
